transcript: AI: तुम्हारे कितने भाई हैं? [How many brothers do you have?] Human: I'm having two brothers. AI: Having नहीं, ऐसे बोलो, I have two brothers. [Not having, say it like this, I have two brothers.] Human: मुझे इंग्लिश अच्छी से नहीं आती। [I don't know English well.] AI: AI teachers ट्राई किया क्या? यह 7 गुना सस्ता है। [Did you try AI teachers? It's 7 times cheaper.] Human: पर मुझे टाइम नहीं मिलता। [But I don't get time.] AI: रोज सिर्फ 15-20 मिनट काफी है। [Just 15-20 minutes daily is enough.] Human: कैसे ज्वाइन करूं? [How do I join?] AI: इंस्टॉल बटन दबाओ और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Press the install button and download MySivi.]
on_screen_text: Tumhare kitne [How many of your] / I'm having two brothers / Having nahi [Not having] / I have two brothers / Normal English classes se 7 guna sasta hai [7x cheaper than normal classes] / MySivi AI English Speaking / Install
summary: An AI avatar corrects a user's English grammar in a split-screen setup. The AI promotes the MySivi app as an affordable, quick daily practice tool to build speaking confidence, concluding with an install CTA.
